title: Medieval Punk
description: This mod pack combine elements from Medieval time and the Steampunk era!
body:
# About this mod!

**This mod pack combine elements from Medieval time and the Steampunk era! The mod aims to add difficulty, exploration, choices, and many more! This pack features thirst, extra animation when eating/drinking, a lot more structures, many many more mobs to fight off, a ton more bosses with very rewarding loot, more weapons to expierence and lots of new items and trinkets to collect!**

# Features

**This modpack adds the create mod, allowing you to automate your tasks and giving your world more of the steampunk vibe! Amongst this, the modpack adds fantasy aspects such as, spells, werewolves, vampires, curses, rituals, unique abilities and powers, and many many more.**

**As well as adding a level system to make the expierience more like an RPG, adding jobs to make money in the fully economy system changing emeralds for actual currency when trading with villagers and finally adding RPG zones making it so the further you go, the harder it gets.**

# Starter Kit

**The mod "Starter Kit" allows you to change the items you and everyone else spawn with. The current starter kit "normal" gives info books as well as 16 bread, a campfire, 6 empty bottles, and a red sleeping bag. To change the equipment I reccomend following this guide [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/starter-kit](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/starter-kit). This guide will show you how to set a kit as well as make it so everyone in the game who joins gets that kit!**

# Multiplayer

**Along with all of these great additions the modpack is fully multiplayer adding the essential mod to allow you to easily play with your friends! Also adding player specific loot to make sure everyone can get their own chance at becoming great!**

**Playing with others gives you the oppurtunity to take on bosses easier as well as curse your friends, so if you ever want to get back at your friends, you can set a curse on them using a ritual or if you just want to duel them using knight armor and weapons with incredible combat animations, that's here too!**
